name: Chinese Barbeque Pork (Char Siew)
recipeInstructions: Slice pork into strips approximately 1 1/2 inches thick, 5-6 inches long, and 1/2 inch wide. Combine all the ingredients for the sauce and mix well. Marinate pork strips in sauce for a minimum of 2 hours. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Bake pork in the pre-heated oven for 25 minutes, turning it over halfway through the cooking time for an additional 25 minutes.
